name: HMS Monnow (K 441)
events: 16 Apr 1944 HMS United (Lt. N.R. Wood, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, first with HMS Monnow (Cdr. E.G. Skinner, DSC, RD, RCNR) and later with HMS Havelock (Lt.Cdr. R. Hart, DSC and Bar, RN), La Surprise (?). (1)

19 Apr 1944 HMS United (Lt. N.R. Wood, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, first with HMS Lapwing (Cdr.(Retd.) E.C. Hulton, RN) and later with HMS Monnow (Cdr. E.G. Skinner, DSC, RD, RCNR) and HMS Knaresborough Castle (Lt. J.R. Freeman, RNR). (1)

20 Apr 1944 HMS United (Lt. N.R. Wood, RN) conducted A/S exercises off Tobermory, first with HMS Knaresborough Castle (Lt. J.R. Freeman, RNR) and HMS Monnow (Cdr. E.G. Skinner, DSC, RD, RCNR) and later with HMCS Teme (T/Lt.Cdr. D.G. Jeffrey, DSO, RCNR) and HMS Lapwing (Cdr.(Retd.) E.C. Hulton, RN). (1)
ADM numbers indicate documents at the British National Archives at Kew, London.
